Tribe/Squad/Team: Estate Management / ICE Cowboys

Role being undertaken: Developer supporting SPESTG-1054 UAT deployment validation.

Reason for access: Operator access is required to support SPESTG-1054 UAT deployment validation and pipeline troubleshooting for the t3_d365connect_uat Azure subscription. This access is needed to validate UAT resources, check deployment-related configuration, and support environment-level verification after pipeline execution. No delete permission is required.
